description.message: Kimi WebBridge — browser extension for AI agents. AI can open pages, click, fill forms, extract info, and automate web tasks.
description.description: Extension description shown in Chrome Web Store and extension management page.

readyMessage.description: Popup main message in connected state.

notReadyMessage.description: Popup main message in disconnected state.

setupGuideButton.description: Popup CTA button label in disconnected state — links to docs site.

userGuideLink.description: Popup link label in connected state — links to docs site.

docsLinkUrl.description: Locale-specific docs URL opened by the popup CTA / link.

devClickHint.message: $N$ more clicks to enable advanced options

devTestFailed.message: Connection failed — check address, network, and that the daemon is running

devUrlWrongProtocol.message: URL must start with ws:// or wss://

devTrustWarningTitle.message: This server will gain control of your browser

devTrustWarningBody.message: It can click, type, read page contents, and operate tabs. Only continue if you fully trust this server.

devTrustWarningInsecure.message: ⚠ Connection is unencrypted (ws://) — anyone on the same network can monitor or tamper with traffic.
